testcase.name: investFlowTest

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of Proxy element for: DefaultElementLocator 'By.xpath: //div[contains(@class,'currt-bal')]//h5' (tried for 5 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
